summary: Data quality testing for peptide library translation. 12/20 backend tests passed (60%). Main issues: 6 peptides still have Portuguese descriptions, 2 peptides have Portuguese classifications, 4 peptides have Portuguese reconstitution_difficulty ('Moderada'). Core requirements (96 peptides, 11 English categories, no competitor URLs, semaglutide/retatrutide dosages) all PASS.

minor.issue: Portuguese description: 'Biorregulador peptídico para cartilagem e articulações.'
Portuguese description: 'Formulação injetável de fatores neurotróficos peptídicos.' AND Portuguese classification: 'Mistura peptídica neurotrófica (derivada de suínos)'
Portuguese description: 'Peptídeo derivado da angiotensina IV com potentes efeitos nootrópicos.'
Portuguese description: 'Peptídeo regulador de telomerase com propriedades anti-aging.'
Portuguese description: 'Peptídeo senolítico que elimina seletivamente células senescentes.'
Portuguese description: 'Tripeptídeo antioxidante mestre do organismo.'
Portuguese classification: 'Fragmento peptídico do hGH (16 aminoácidos)'

action_items: Translate 6 Portuguese descriptions to English: cartalax, cerebrolysin, dihexa, epithalon, foxo4-dri, glutathione
Translate 2 Portuguese classifications to English: aod-9604 ('Fragmento peptídico do hGH'), cerebrolysin ('Mistura peptídica neurotrófica')
Fix reconstitution_difficulty 'Moderada' -> 'Moderate' for: retatrutide, cagrilintide, chonluten, cortagen, dihexa
critical_code_review_comments: The seed_library_production.json still contains untranslated Portuguese content in description, classification, and reconstitution_difficulty fields for several peptides
Translation was incomplete - overview/protocols/research/synergy were translated but some metadata fields were missed
test_credentials: No auth required for library endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Core data quality requirements pass: 96 peptides, 11 English categories, no competitor URLs, semaglutide/retatrutide dosages correct. Remaining issues are untranslated Portuguese content in 6 descriptions, 2 classifications, and 5 reconstitution_difficulty fields. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_library_data_quality.py covers all data quality checks.
